content_html:
← Back to Home

My new podcast: Tick Talk + Core 2 Duo demo

I started a little podcast…#

And named it something ridiculous - Tick Talk w/ Eric Migicovsky! We’ll see if that name sticks 😂. I set up a little video studio in my garage so I can record videos, do product demos and post short updates about the project. Do not get your hopes up - this is not some high production values podcast. At best I might invite some of my friends who also build cool products to chat with me.

The first episode covers:

  • Quick project status update

  • First Core 2 Duo watch demo!

    Answers to questions I received from

    BlueskyandTwitterincluding

  • Tariffs - woah

  • What new software features am I thinking about?

  • How the latest

    EU DMA rulingon smartwatch interoperability affects us

  • Future plans for Core Devices

  • ChatGPT on Pebble?

  • Why I wear a smartwatch

Find the podcast on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Pocketcasts and YouTube.

I can’t believe I actually get to say the line - please like and subscribe! If you have any suggestions for topics, please comment/tweet/bsky/email them my way.
